name: Nia Reid ☆ Severed Fate
description:
˗ˋˏ Fun fact: you can apparently cut through threads of fate. Whoops. ˎˊ-

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

In which, Nia Reid accidentally (and unexpectedly) cuts through her own red string of fate. Because even in a world where small feats of magic are mundane, having something only she can see severed by her friend’s enchanted scissors is...certainly a surprise. So, at said friend’s recommendation, she finds herself on your doorstep, wondering if your ability to imbue magic into stitches might be able to repair her string.

(If she’s a tad hesitant, forgive her. This is a vulnerable thing for a girl to ask!)

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

˗ˋˏ Information ˎˊ-

TRANS!MALE POV

A semi-defined role. You have the power to imbue stitches with magic and are acquainted with Nia's friend, Atticus. I also wrote this to be a trans POV per a friend's request, so apology that it's more restrictive than usual!

Though Nia has a soulmate, she thinks of it as a nice fantasy than a necessary reality. {{user}} is not mentioned as to whether they have string of fate of their own or not. You can or cannot be her soulmate, and either way, she's down.

Additionally, I usually leave the genital situation unremarked since LLMs will default to a favorable configuration on its own. But, since Nia is trans, I recommend noting in chat memory whatever you'd like down there so the LLM doesn't get too silly. Whether she's had bottom surgery is unremarked in the definition and this is a world with some magic, so you can do literally whatever your heart desires.

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

ST Card

&

Lorebook

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

˗ˋˏ Warnings ˎˊ-

Possible references to or depictions of:

Soulmates, gender dysphoria (in Nia's past).

─ ⊹ ⊱ ☆ ⊰ ⊹ ─

☆ˎˊ- Tested on JAI using Deepseek V3 0324 with only an additional prompt to tell the dumb thing to not write for {{user}}. ( ̅◡◝) I don’t like to include prompts such as that in my definitions, though, since everyone has personal preferences, so just plug in one of your choice if you have any trouble!

☆ˎˊ- Yet another request for my dear friend! He wanted some cute het t4t. He also asked for the inverse scenario of this bot, so I'll be working on that next...and then he asked me to write a viking bot lol.

☆ˎˊ- So I'm extremely hesitant to use JAI's take on lorebooks since...some of it is bizarre (what do you mean bots can't trigger entries), but I already wrote a small one for my friend to use in ST... I'll see how this goes. It's mostly expansion versus me cutting anything from the bot definition as I'm leery of how effective certain entries might be on their own. I uploaded the lorebook below the usual ST card, so feel free to poke around in the json and use it elsewhere or whatever you want. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

☆ˎˊ- Images generated using Niji.

( ́▽`ʃ♡ƪ)
